rationale: Two allocators in one file. variant_ratio(kstrdup) = (3, 1) anomaly; variant_ratio(kmalloc) = (1, 2) idiom direction. Tests per-allocator isolation in variant_ratio. Axis-3 fires on the kstrdup_miss site → EXPLOITABLE.

lifecycle_precondition.notes: Multi-allocator fixture; tests per-allocator ratio isolation.
